howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Booking your dream holiday home is simple and secure. Here's how to get started.

1.title: Explore properties
1.description: Search by area and find available options.

2.title: Pick a day
2.description: Check the calendar and choose when you want to visit.

3.title: Book your visit
3.description: Arrive knowing what to expect. Real homes, clear agreements, and the peace of mind of renting on a local platform.

4.title: Finalize with the owner
4.description: Get your confirmation and get ready for your next stay.

hero.title: About
hero.description: We're on a mission to transform how people experience vacation homes. By curating extraordinary properties and providing unparalleled service, we create memories that last a lifetime.

story.title: Our
story.paragraph1: En cartelera - Escapadas began with a simple idea: vacation rentals should be as luxurious and memorable as the finest hotels, but with the space and privacy of a home.
story.paragraph2: Our founder, Anna Svensson, experienced this firsthand when searching for the perfect holiday home for her family. Frustrated by the lack of quality options and inconsistent experiences, she decided to create a platform that would change the vacation rental industry forever.
story.paragraph3: Today, we've curated over 800 exceptional properties across 50+ countries, each personally inspected and vetted to ensure they meet our uncompromising standards for luxury, comfort, and authenticity.

values.title: Our
values.subtitle: These principles guide everything we do and shape the experiences we create for our guests.

passion.title: Passion for Hospitality
passion.description: We believe that every vacation should feel like coming home to a place that truly cares about your comfort and happiness.

excellence.title: Excellence in Every Detail
excellence.description: From property selection to guest support, we maintain the highest standards in everything we do.

global.title: Global Perspective
global.description: Our international team brings diverse experiences and insights to create truly special vacation experiences.

trust.title: Trust & Transparency
trust.description: We build lasting relationships through honest communication and reliable service you can count on.

team.title: Meet Our
team.subtitle: The passionate individuals behind En cartelera - Escapadas, dedicated to creating extraordinary experiences for our guests.

anna.name: Anna Svensson
anna.bio: With over 15 years in luxury hospitality, Anna founded En cartelera - Escapadas to revolutionize how people experience vacation homes.

marcus.name: Marcus Johnson
marcus.bio: Marcus ensures every property meets our exacting standards for luxury, comfort, and authenticity.

elena.name: Elena Rodriguez
elena.bio: Elena leads our 24/7 customer support team, ensuring every guest has an exceptional experience.

cta.title: Join Our
cta.description: Experience the difference that passion, attention to detail, and genuine care can make. Your perfect holiday home awaits.

hero.title: Terms of
hero.description1: Please read these terms carefully before using En cartelera - Escapadas.
hero.description2: By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.paragraph1: By accessing and using En cartelera - Escapadas, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.
acceptance.paragraph2: These Terms of Service apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use our services. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

useLicense.title: Use License
useLicense.paragraph1: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on En cartelera - Escapadas for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.
useLicense.paragraph2: This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
useLicense.item2: use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display
useLicense.item3: attempt to reverse engineer any software contained on our website
useLicense.item4: remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials

userAccount.title: User Account
userAccount.paragraph1: When you create an account with us, you must provide information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. You are responsible for safeguarding the password and for all activities that occur under your account.
userAccount.paragraph2: You agree not to disclose your password to any third party. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account.

bookings.title: Bookings and Payments
bookings.paragraph1: All bookings are subject to availability and confirmation. Prices are subject to change without notice until a booking is confirmed.
bookings.paragraph2: Payment must be made in full at the time of booking unless otherwise agreed. We accept major credit cards and other payment methods as displayed on our platform.
bookings.paragraph3: Cancellations and refunds are subject to the specific property's cancellation policy, which will be clearly displayed during the booking process.

propertyStandards.title: Property Standards
propertyStandards.paragraph1: We strive to provide properties that meet high standards of quality, cleanliness, and safety. All properties listed on our platform have been inspected and approved by our team.
propertyStandards.paragraph2: However, we cannot guarantee the condition of properties at all times, and guests should report any issues immediately upon arrival to allow us to address them promptly.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.paragraph1: In no event shall En cartelera - Escapadas or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on our platform.
liability.paragraph2: We shall not be held responsible for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.paragraph1: Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs your use of our services, to understand our practices.
privacy.paragraph2: By using our services, you consent to the collection and use of information in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

termination.title: Termination
termination.paragraph1: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.
termination.paragraph2: Upon termination, your right to use the service will cease immediately. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using the service.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.paragraph1: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will try to provide at least 30 days notice prior to any new terms taking effect.
changes.paragraph2: What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion. By continuing to access or use our service after those revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

footer.questionsBody: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service or need clarification on any point, please don't hesitate to contact our legal team.

hero.title: Privacy
hero.description1: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our platform.
hero.description2: By using our services, you consent to the practices described in this policy.

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.paragraph1: The entity responsible for processing your personal data is [Company Name], located at [Physical Address], with the contact email [Support Email].

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.intro: To facilitate summer house rentals, we collect:
dataCollected.item1: Identity Data: Full name, ID number (DNI, ID card, Passport).
dataCollected.item2: Contact Data: Email address, phone number, physical address.
dataCollected.item3: Property Data: (For owners) Address, photos, and descriptions.
dataCollected.item4: Payment Data: Information processed securely via our payment gateways (we do not store full credit card numbers).
dataCollected.item5: Technical Data: IP address, cookies, and browsing data.

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing
purpose.item2: Facilitate communication between guests and hosts.
purpose.item3: Verify user identity for security purposes.
purpose.item4: Send promotional communications (only with your consent).
purpose.item5: Comply with legal and tax obligations in Uruguay, Argentina, and Brazil.

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis
legalBasis.intro: We process your data based on:

internationalTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.paragraph1: As we operate in Uruguay, Argentina, and Brazil, your data may be transferred between these countries to provide the service. We ensure that such transfers comply with the security standards required by local authorities (URCDP in Uruguay, AAIP in Argentina, and ANPD in Brazil).

userRights.title: User Rights
userRights.paragraph1: You have the right to access, rectify, update, delete, or withdraw consent for the use of your data. To exercise these rights, please send an email to [Support Email] with the subject "Data Protection."

security.title: Security
security.paragraph1: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration.

footer.questionsBody: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal data, please contact our team.
